mapper.select: /* EtcMapper.selectMemberDtl */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
/* EtcMapper.selectBankList */ SELECT BANK_CODE AS bankCode ,BANK_NAME AS bankName FROM BANK_CODE ORDER BY BANK_CODE
/* EtcMapper.selectCardList */ SELECT CARD_CODE AS cardCode ,CARD_NAME AS cardName FROM CARD_CODE ORDER BY CARD_CODE
/* EtcMapper.selectCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM CATEGORY_CODE ORDER BY CATEGORY_CODE
/* EtcMapper.selectAccountList */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,AI_SE AS aiSe ,AI_NM AS aiNm FROM TB_ACCOUNT_INFO WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY AI_SE DESC, AI_SEQ
